message:
chore: move long-form planning and spec docs into docs/planning/ + update load-bearing path references

Sixteen large markdown documents at the repo root are the canonical
design and planning artefacts for FrankenSQLite. Several are massive
(COMPREHENSIVE_SPEC_FOR_FRANKENSQLITE_V1.md is 846 KB; the CODEX
companion is 91 KB; STATE_OF_THE_CODEBASE_AND_NEXT_STEPS.md is 104 KB)
and they have lasting value — the spec is *the* normative reference
for the harness and the parity audits. They do not belong at the repo
root, where they overwhelm the actual project surface (Cargo.toml,
README.md, src/...).

Move them all into docs/planning/, alongside the existing docs/adr/,
docs/design/, and other knowledge-base directories. The migration
preserves git history (git mv only) and the 16 docs are:

- COMPREHENSIVE_SPEC_FOR_FRANKENSQLITE_V1.md (canonical spec, 846 KB)
- COMPREHENSIVE_SPEC_FOR_FRANKENSQLITE_V1_CODEX.md (91 KB companion)
- PLAN_TO_PORT_SQLITE_TO_RUST.md
- PROPOSED_ARCHITECTURE.md
- MVCC_SPECIFICATION.md
- EXISTING_SQLITE_STRUCTURE.md
- PERFORMANCE_OPTIMIZATION_PLAN.md
- STATE_OF_THE_CODEBASE_AND_NEXT_STEPS.md
- COVERAGE.md
- E2E_SCENARIO_MATRIX.md, E2E_SCENARIO_TRACEABILITY.md
- UNIT_INVARIANT_MATRIX.md
- BEAD_AUDIT_REPORT.md
- UPGRADE_LOG.md
- TODO.md, tasks.md (project-level; spec-level TODOs live elsewhere)

Path-reference updates required for the move (verified by grep that
all "COMPREHENSIVE_SPEC..." / etc. string literals are now empty
across *.rs, *.sh, *.toml, *.json outside docs/):

- crates/fsqlite-harness/src/bin/spec_to_beads_audit.rs:
  workspace_root.join("...") path updated to "docs/planning/..."
- crates/fsqlite-harness/tests/rfc2119_hygiene_audit.rs:
  SPEC_REL_PATH constant updated.
- crates/fsqlite-harness/tests/spec_authority_integrity_audit.rs:
  SPEC_REL_PATH and the LEGACY_DOCS array (PROPOSED_ARCHITECTURE,
  MVCC_SPECIFICATION, PLAN_TO_PORT_SQLITE_TO_RUST,
  EXISTING_SQLITE_STRUCTURE) updated.
- crates/fsqlite-harness/tests/bd_4eue_reference_index_compliance.rs:
  PROJECT_REFERENCE_DOCS array updated for the four moved spec docs.
- crates/fsqlite-harness/tests/spec_to_beads_audit.rs:
  spec_path in two AuditConfig literals updated.
- crates/fsqlite-harness/tests/workspace_layering.rs:
  spec_section_8_3 / spec_section_8_4 path resolution updated.
- e2e/reference_index_audit.sh, e2e/bd_sxm2_compliance.sh:
  shell SPEC_PATH and project_docs() arrays updated.
- crates/fsqlite-btree/src/balance.rs: cosmetic comment reference
  updated to the new location, since it points readers there.

Verified by `cargo check -p fsqlite-harness --bin spec_to_beads_audit`
which exercises the workspace dependency graph that pulls in every
spec-aware crate; check passes clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -52,12 +52,12 @@ const C_SQLITE_REFERENCE_FILES: [&str; 15] = [
 ];
 
 const PROJECT_REFERENCE_DOCS: [&str; 6] = [
-    "COMPREHENSIVE_SPEC_FOR_FRANKENSQLITE_V1.md",
-    "EXISTING_SQLITE_STRUCTURE.md",
+    "docs/planning/COMPREHENSIVE_SPEC_FOR_FRANKENSQLITE_V1.md",
+    "docs/planning/EXISTING_SQLITE_STRUCTURE.md",
     "docs/rfc6330.txt",
     "AGENTS.md",
-    "MVCC_SPECIFICATION.md",
-    "PROPOSED_ARCHITECTURE.md",
+    "docs/planning/MVCC_SPECIFICATION.md",
+    "docs/planning/PROPOSED_ARCHITECTURE.md",
 ];
 
 const ASUPERSYNC_REFERENCE_MODULES: [&str; 11] = [

@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ LOG_SCHEMA_VERSION="1.0.0"
 SCENARIO_ID="SPEC-8"
 SEED=202602130202
 BACKEND="fsqlite"
-SPEC_PATH="COMPREHENSIVE_SPEC_FOR_FRANKENSQLITE_V1.md"
+SPEC_PATH="docs/planning/COMPREHENSIVE_SPEC_FOR_FRANKENSQLITE_V1.md"
 WORKSPACE_ROOT="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
 RUN_ID="${BEAD_ID}-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)-$$"
 REPORT_ROOT="${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/test-results/bd_sxm2"
